name: GVM SD80 D Bi-Color LED Monolight Video Light

features.Key Features: For Film, Broadcast & Video Production | Output: 6900 Lux at 3.3' (4300K) | 2700 to 7500K CCT | AC Adapter or Optional NP-F Batteries | Onboard and App Control via Bluetooth | CRI 97+ | TLCI 97+ | Eight Scene Lighting Effects
